channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Man United secures stunning late 2-1 comeback win against Man City
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Amad Diallo struck a 90th-minute winner as Manchester United staged a stunning late comeback to beat Manchester City 2-1 in the Premier League on Sunday. Four-time defending champion City led the Manchester derby 1-0 going into the 88th minute at the Etihad Stadium.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Southampton fires Russell Martin after 5-0 rout by Spurs on a bad day for Premier League managers
item.description: SOUTHAMPTON, England (AP) — Southampton fired manager Russell Martin late Sunday after the Premier League's last-placed team was thrashed 5-0 by Tottenham. Southampton has only won once in the league this season and is nine points adrift of safety.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mahomes throws 2 TD passes, leaves with ankle injury in Chiefs' 21-7 win. X-rays negative on star QB
item.description: Patrick Mahomes threw two touchdown passes before leaving with an ankle injury, Xavier Worthy ran for a score and the Kansas City Chiefs finally didn’t have to sweat out the final minutes with a 21-7 victory over the mistake-prone Cleveland Browns.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Miami WR DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head against Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Miami receiver Grant DuBose was taken off the field on a stretcher after a helmet-to-helmet hit against the Houston Texans on Sunday. DuBose tried to make a catch in the third quarter, but was hit in the head by rookie Calen Bullock before his head violently hit the turf.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pep Guardiola says 'I'm not good enough' after latest Man City loss
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Pep Guardiola declared himself “not good enough” after Manchester City's season sunk to a new low after a 2-1 defeat to Manchester United on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kevin Owens hits Cody Rhodes with piledriver, Chelsea Green makes history at Saturday Night's Main Event
item.description: Cody Rhodes retained the Undisputed WWE Championship over Kevin Owens but Owens got the last word. Chelsea Green also made history at the premium live event.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Freddie Freeman's walk-off grand slam ball sells for $1.56 million at auction
item.description: LAGUNA NIGUEL, Calif. (AP) — Freddie Freeman’s historic walk-off grand slam ball from Game 1 of the World Series has sold for $1.56 million at auction. The bidding at SCP Auctions went into the late hours of Saturday night, according to a statement from the auction house on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 49ers' De'Vondre Campbell's refusal to enter game likely to lead to suspension: report
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers are likely to suspend linebacker De'Vondre Campbell over his refusal to enter a game against the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bluegrass rivalry enters new era with No. 5 Kentucky and Louisville led by Mark Pope and Pat Kelsey
item.description: LEXINGTON, Ky. (AP) — Transition remains for Mark Pope with No. 5 Kentucky and Pat Kelsey with Louisville, growing pains and all.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inspiring effort: De La Salle’s rally comes up short against Mater Dei in Open state title game
item.description: CIF Open Division state football championship 2024: De La Salle comes back from huge halftime deficit against Mater Dei, but big rally comes up short.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Utah runs road winning streak to six straight with 4-3 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club has become true road warriors. Clayton Keller scored a power-play goal with 43.8 seconds remaining and the Utah Hockey Club rallied to beat the San Jose Sharks 4-3 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blake Horvath shines as Navy dominates in a 31-13 victory over Bryson Daily and No. 19 Army
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — This was an Army-Navy game unlike any before it. The teams had combined for 19 victories this season before their annual clash, a record for the rivalry. Of course, only one of them would be responsible for No. 20 — the biggest win of them all. “I think they're like us.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Marshall withdraws from Independence Bowl matchup against Army
item.description: HUNTINGTON, W.V. (AP) — Marshall has withdrawn from the Independence Bowl after a coaching change resulted in much of its roster jumping into the transfer portal. The Thundering Herd were slated to play Army on Dec. 28 in Shreveport, Louisiana.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL QB Carson Palmer is the new head coach at Santa Margarita High School, his alma mater
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Longtime NFL quarterback and Heisman Trophy winner Carson Palmer is the new head coach at Santa Margarita High School, his alma mater. Santa Margarita announced the hiring of Palmer on social media Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs' run game faced with challenging front seven
item.description: Quarterback Baker Mayfield is faced with a challenging Chargers defense that is allowing the fewest points in the NFL. The Chargers are led by the edge-rush combo of Joey Bosa and Khalil Mack.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The fate of Tropicana Field's repairs lies in the hands of St. Pete City Council
item.description: The St. Pete City Council will vote on Thursday afternoon to begin the process of repairing Tropicana Field or not.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Girls Basketball: Clairemont 24, Preuss 18
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball in Clairemont with Preuss dribbling against the Chieftains. A low scoring defensive game went the way for the home team with Clairemont winning 24-18.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: SJ Earthquakes welcome 3 new players in deadline trade
item.description: (KRON) – Three players have been traded to the San Jose Earthquakes, the team announced Monday. Defender Dave Romney and midfielders Ian Harkes and Mark-Anthony Kaye will be making their way to Silicon Valley from the New England Revolution.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Miami's Ward, Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty, and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON AP College Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Reports: White Sox sign former Cub Mike Tauchman
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Free agent outfielder Mike Tauchman is trading the North Side for the South Side, according to multiple reports. MLB.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers reach $17M, 1-year deal with Conforto and $22M, 2-year contract with Treinen, AP sources say
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers agreed to a $17 million, one-year contract to add outfielder Michael Conforto and a $22 million, two-year deal to retain right-hander Blake Treinen, people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5
